meta.title: Get involved
meta.description: Join our mission to reduce e-waste and make technology accessible to everyone. Become a volunteer, intern, or partner.

page.ctaDescription: Join our community of changemakers and help us create a more sustainable future through technology.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We believe in creating a sustainable future through responsible technology use and waste reduction.

community.title: Community
community.description: Building strong communities through technology education and inclusive participation.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Finding creative solutions to make technology accessible and environmentally friendly.

globalImpact.title: Global impact
globalImpact.description: Making a difference in local and global communities through technology.

meta.title: Volunteering
meta.description: Join our team of dedicated volunteers and make a difference in your community through technology and sustainability.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.description: Join our team of dedicated volunteers and help make technology sustainable and accessible to everyone.
volunteer.flexibilityNote: We understand that everyone has different schedules. We offer flexible volunteer activities that fit around your other commitments. Whether you can spare a few hours a week or more — your contribution will make a difference.
steps: Contact us to express your interest
Meet with our team to discuss your skills and interests

meta.title: Donate
meta.description: Help directly. Every donation saves devices from e-waste and makes technology accessible to everyone.

donate.heroDescription: Every donation saves devices from e-waste, extends lifecycles, and enables technology access for people who couldn't otherwise afford it.
donate.donateDevicesDescription: Hardware you no longer need can give someone else a real opportunity. We accept working or repairable devices, refurbish them, and pass them on.
donate.weAcceptList: Laptops, desktop PCs, monitors, keyboards, mice, printers — working or repairable.
donate.weDoNotAcceptList: Physically damaged devices, broken screens without frames.
donate.preparationText: Please erase your personal data before dropping off (we can help if needed).
donate.newsletterTitle: We'll keep you informed of how your donation makes an impact.
donate.newsletterDescription: No adverts. Only real updates on devices saved, CO₂ reduced, and people supported.

impact.tier1Description: 1 laptop rescued from e-waste + 285 kg CO₂ avoided.
impact.tier2Description: 2 devices refurbished + a place in our Linux workshop for someone who couldn't otherwise afford it.
impact.tier3Description: 10 devices for educational institutions, social projects, or low-income households.

meta.title: Partnerships
meta.description: Work with us to create sustainable technology solutions and achieve lasting impact.

partnerships.title: Partnership opportunities
processSteps: Initial consultation to understand goals and opportunities
Development of partnership framework and objectives
Regular progress reviews and impact assessment
howToStartSteps: Contact us to discuss partnership opportunities
Share your organisation's goals and interests

meta.title: Internships
meta.description: Gain hands-on experience in technology and sustainability through our internship programme.

internships.title: Internship opportunities
internships.description: Gain valuable experience in technology and sustainability while making a real difference.
howToApplySteps: Send us your CV and a cover letter
State your area of interest and availability
Have a brief conversation with us

meta.title: Technical experts
meta.description: Share your technical expertise and help us develop innovative solutions for sustainable technology.

technicalExperts.title: Technical experts
technicalExperts.description: Share your expertise and help us develop innovative solutions for sustainable technology.
howToStartSteps: Contact us with your area of expertise and interests
Review our development guidelines and processes

meta.title: IT Help technician
meta.description: Share your IT knowledge and help people in your community — flexible, no prior experience needed, real impact.

itHilfeTechniker.title: Become an IT Help technician
itHilfeTechniker.description: Your IT knowledge can make life easier for others. Help community members with their computers — flexibly, straightforwardly, and with real impact.
howToStartSteps: Create your technician profile with your skills and availability
Wait for requests — you decide which ones you take on
Arrange an appointment directly with the person requesting help

meta.title: Work reintegration
meta.description: Join our work reintegration programme to gain valuable skills and experience in technology while rebuilding your career.

workReintegration.title: Work reintegration programme
workReintegration.description: Join our supportive programme to rebuild your career in technology and sustainability.
howToStartSteps: Contact us to discuss your situation
Meet with our team for an assessment

meta.title: Express interest
meta.description: Write to us briefly about what interests you — we'll get back to you personally.

kontakt.title: Interest in {topic}
kontakt.description: Tell us briefly who you are and what you're interested in. We'll get back to you personally.
